final:
module top_module(
	input subtract,
	input [7:0] B,
	output [7:0] S
);assign S = (subtract ? ~B+1 : B);
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      S <= B; if (subtract) begin S <= ~B + 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: S <= B; if (subtract) begin S <= ~B + 1; end
